title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.190 - Respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) awareness week designated for the last week of October
text:
9.190.  Respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) awareness week designated for the last week of October. — The last full week in October is hereby designated as "Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) Awareness Week" in the state of Missouri.  The citizens of this state are encouraged to observe the week with appropriate activities and events.
(L. 2013 H.B. 68)
